formPrompt: Use dragon fruit skin scales as the primary plant form: layered triangular bracts, oval fruit body, rhythmic scale pattern, and bold organic armor.
translationPrompt: Translate it into layered metal, paper, resin, or ceramic scales around an oval diffuser, using low-saturation color only.
placementPrompt: Best for sculptural pendants, table lamps, floor lamps, or statement wall lights.
